title: Ireland Open Data Portal catalogue
publisher: Department of Public Expenditure, NDP Delivery and Reform
description: Master catalogue used to discover and track public Irish datasets and publisher metadata.
provenanceNotes: Use CKAN metadata as discovery layer, not as proof of dataset quality.

title: CSO StatBank and statistical geography
license: CSO open data terms; verify per table
description: Population, labour, housing, commuting, deprivation-adjacent and statistical-area context.
provenanceNotes: Keep table IDs and retrieval timestamps for every normalized extract.

title: Tailte Éireann spatial reference data
description: Roads, place names, boundaries and spatial reference context where public licensing permits.

title: NTA GTFS and public transport data
license: NTA open-data terms; verify current terms
description: Stops, routes, trips, schedules and realtime public-transport context.
provenanceNotes: Realtime snapshots must be timestamped and retained only according to permitted terms.

title: TII traffic and national roads data
description: Traffic counters, AADT, road network, travel times and national road context.
provenanceNotes: Exposure metrics are factual context only.

title: RSA collision and casualty data
publisher: Road Safety Authority / Department of Transport
description: Collision and casualty records and aggregates used as one context domain.
provenanceNotes: No blackspot, fault, causation or recommendation claims are produced by this project.

title: Met Éireann observations, forecasts, warnings and climate data
license: Often CC BY 4.0; verify per endpoint
description: Weather observations and warnings for temporal/spatial context.
provenanceNotes: Contextual observations only; do not infer causation.

title: OPW flood maps and flood risk datasets
description: Flood extents, flood risk context and related environmental layers.
provenanceNotes: Modelled extents require scale and confidence notes.

title: HSE and public health service locations
description: Hospitals, urgent care, clinics and health-service access context.
provenanceNotes: Directory data may lag real-world service changes.

title: School locations and education statistics
license: Open data terms where published; verify per file
description: School locations, roll numbers and education context.
provenanceNotes: Sensitive interpretation around children/schools must remain data-only.

title: Local authority infrastructure and civic assets
description: Public lighting, crossings, traffic signals, roadworks, parking, drainage, active travel and civic assets where published.
provenanceNotes: Coverage is uneven; missingness is a first-class output.
